audit_items.proof_trace: The `s_entered` boolean guard (set true at L418, cleared at L457) blocks all re-entry into `bid()` during the callback window at L449. All other state-modifying functions that write `s_auctionStarts` (`performUpkeep`, L353/367) or any balance-affecting functions are protected by `onlyRole(Roles.AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE)` or admin role checks that a malicious callback cannot satisfy. The callback-before-pull pattern (L444→L449→L453) is intentional flash-swap design; `assetOutAmount` is a stack variable fixed at L442 and cannot be altered by the callback.
